title: Vanilla Plus
description: vanilla+ with the essential mod, iris sodium and Xaero's minimap
body:
# **Vanilla Plus**
this modpack contains a few mods used to play in a shared world with friends.

![the picture shows the in game GUI, on the top left corner on the screen you can see the minimap.](https://imgur.com/OUTg5mu)

## Features
- essential mod so you can add friends and share your world with them (it's like a lan play but trough the essential mod)
- Xaero's minimap so you can set wayponts, share them with your friends, and see mobs trough the minimap
- iris & sodium for better performance and shaders support
